/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/beout_os_api.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/beout_os_api.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/beout_os_api.dir/api_server.cpp.o -o beout_os_api  ../database/libdatabase.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread ../libsqlite3_lib.a
